    Does x86-64-v3 Really Matter? Benchmarking Standard Arch Linux vs a Fully Optimized CachyOS Stack

    Is the CachyOS kernel actually faster than the official Linux Mainline kernel? I benchmark boot time, CPU performance, memory, compression, decompression, file I/O, gaming, compilation and power usage with reproducible tests.
